{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = World Spirit of The Last Horizon
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[World Spirit of The Last Horizon]] is a figure drawn from four shades of light: blue, red, green, and orange.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[World Spirit of The Last Horizon]] has horns like gnarled branches and seven-pointed star irises.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
